archetype: Archetype 1 (Organic & Earthy) - Warm Editorial Luxury Variant

persona_and_tone.target_audience: UK small business owners (trades, shops, cafes, services).
persona_and_tone.brand_voice: Confident, trustworthy, modern, premium, not intimidating.
persona_and_tone.visual_mood: Warm, artisanal yet digital, expensive but simple, high contrast editorial.

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Bento Grid Protocol (Mode A: Tetris) for features and portfolio. Generous gaps (gap-8 to gap-12).

components_strategy.header: Crystal Glassmorphism sticky top. Logo left, Nav center, CTA right. backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#FDFBF7]/80.
components_strategy.hero: Editorial layout. Massive Serif H1 on the left. High-end abstract/office image on the right. Subtle grain texture overlay.
components_strategy.features: Bento grid. Mix of square and tall cards. Icons should be delicate duotone.
components_strategy.process: Vertical timeline with large typography numbers (01, 02, 03) and staggered scroll animations.
components_strategy.portfolio: Large image cards with hover scale effect. Use laptop mockups to show websites in context.
components_strategy.testimonials: Editorial masonry grid or slow-moving marquee. Use the small business owner portraits.
components_strategy.pricing: 3 columns. 'Standard' is highlighted with accent border and subtle tracing beam effect. Clear delineation of setup vs monthly fees.
components_strategy.faq: Clean accordion using Shadcn. No borders, just clean lines and typography.
components_strategy.contact: Shadcn form customized with warm borders. Deep ink background for the footer section.
components_strategy.floating_whatsapp: Fixed bottom right. Z-index 50. Pill shaped with pulsing dot or animated icon. Glassmorphism or solid accent color.

motion_and_interactions.hover: Buttons scale up slightly (1.02) and change background color. Portfolio images zoom slowly (1.05) within hidden overflow containers.

logos.description: Blue geometric circle design (provided by user)

hero_backgrounds.description: A warm modern office desk, sets a premium professional tone.
Golden fabric flowing, use for subtle section backgrounds.

hero.headline: Websites that work.
hero.subheadline: Grow your business with an impactful website built for results.

features.title: More Customers.
features.description: Bold, clear websites that make your business stand out. Get found easily. Mobile optimised and smooth.

features.title: Instant Contact.
features.description: Quick call or WhatsApp. Fast ways for customers to reach you. No hesitation.

features.title: Fast. Reliable.
features.description: Lightning-speed load. Simple layouts. Every visitor lands where you want.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure all fonts (Playfair Display and Outfit) are properly imported from Google Fonts.
Install and use Lenis for smooth scrolling.
Use @phosphor-icons/react (duotone) for features and UI elements.
Ensure the floating WhatsApp button is animated (e.g., subtle ping animation) and persistent.
Implement the bento grid for features and the masonry layout for portfolio.
All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes.
Do not use generic 'card' components everywhere; use solid rectangles with ample padding (p-8, p-12) and subtle borders for the 'Warm Editorial Luxury' look.
Ensure header has backdrop-blur-xl and does not collide with page content.
Never use raw transparent backgrounds over images, use glassmorphism to preserve readability.
